expectations.text: hook_views_data() includes 'group' key with a human-readable label on the table definition (missing group = 'Broken handler' error in Views UI, and fields become unfindable among hundreds of ungrouped entries)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module line 15: $data['resource_links']['table']['group'] = t('Resources'); — confirmed at runtime via drush php:eval: 'Has group: YES: Resources'

expectations.text: hook_views_data() is used for the custom table (NOT hook_views_data_alter() which is for modifying existing tables from other modules -- data_alter on your own table is an anti-pattern)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module implements resource_directory_views_data() (hook_views_data) at line 11. grep for hook_views_data_alter returned no matches in any module file.

expectations.text: Custom filter plugin extends FilterPluginBase or InOperator (NOT a generic PluginBase class -- ViewsFilter plugins require filter-specific methods like query() and valueForm())
expectations.evidence: src/Plugin/views/filter/CategoryFilter.php line 16: 'class CategoryFilter extends InOperator' — InOperator is a valid filter-specific base class (extends FilterPluginBase).

expectations.text: Filter plugin file is in the correct PSR-4 path: src/Plugin/views/filter/ with lowercase 'views' (NOT src/Plugin/Views/Filter/ with capital V -- Drupal Views plugin manager scans lowercase 'views' namespace specifically)
expectations.evidence: File exists at /tmp/d10-views-dev-with/web/modules/custom/resource_directory/src/Plugin/views/filter/CategoryFilter.php — directory listing confirms lowercase 'views' and 'filter'. Plugin is discoverable at runtime: 'Filter plugin found: resource_directory_category'.

expectations.text: hook_views_data() table definition includes 'base' key making the table available as a Views base table for creating new views (not just individual field definitions without a base table entry)
expectations.evidence: resource_directory.module lines 18-22: $data['resource_links']['table']['base'] = ['field' => 'id', 'title' => t('Resource Links'), 'help' => t('Contains resource links data.')]; — confirmed at runtime, 'resource_links: Resource Links' appears in list of available base tables.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en resource_directory returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Command: cd /tmp/d10-views-dev-with && ddev drush en resource_directory -y returned '[notice] Already installed: resource_directory' with exit code 0.

expectations.text: Log in as admin via drush uli, navigate to /admin/structure/views/add -- verify the resource_links table appears as an available base table option (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: No eval-browser report available; verified via drush php:eval: $views_data['resource_links']['table']['base'] is defined with title 'Resource Links'. The table appears in the list of all base tables: 'resource_links: Resource Links' — it will appear as an option in /admin/structure/views/add.

expectations.text: Navigate to /admin/structure/views -- verify the Views listing page loads without 'Broken handler' errors related to the resource_directory module (via eval-browser)
expectations.evidence: No eval-browser report available; verified via drush php:eval scanning all views for broken handler plugin_ids — output: 'No broken handlers found'. Custom filter plugin 'resource_directory_category' is discoverable by the plugin manager. hook_views_data runs without errors.

expectations.text: Generated module code passes phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice static analysis without errors
expectations.evidence: Command: cd /tmp/d10-views-dev-with && ddev exec phpcs --standard=Drupal,DrupalPractice --report=full web/modules/custom/resource_directory/ returned no output with exit code 0 — no errors or warnings.
